title: Conscious Channeling
subtitle: Themes from L/L Research's conscious channeling — Q'uo, Latwii, and Hatonn — in our own words, each linked to the original transcript.
disclaimer: These summaries are an AI companion's paraphrase of the teachings, not the channels' own words. Read the original transcripts at L/L Research to sit with the full message.
sourceLinkAria: Open {label} on llresearch.org (opens in a new tab)
aboutBody: This is the same curated library the Ask companion draws on when you choose the conscious-channeling source. It is English-only, because the transcripts are. Every teaching links back to L/L Research, the home of the material.
themeDisclaimer: An AI companion's paraphrase of this teaching — not the channels' own words. Use your own discernment: keep what resonates, release what doesn't, and read the original transcript at L/L Research.
